provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Media Practitioners Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and Membership of the Council
provisions.title: Establishment of Council
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Council
(1) There shall be a Council, to be known as the Media Council.
(2) The Council shall be a body corporate with perpetual succession, capable of suing and being sued in its own name.
(3) The Council shall have a common seal and may hold, acquire and dispose of any movable or immovable property.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and Membership of the Council
provisions.title: Independence of Council
provisions.content:
4. Independence of Council
The Council shall operate without any political or other bias or interference, and shall be wholly independent and separate from the government, any political party or any other body.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and Membership of the Council
provisions.title: Objects of Council

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and Membership of the Council
provisions.title: Registration and accreditation of resident media practitioners
provisions.content:
6. Registration and accreditation of resident media practitioners
(1) A resident media practitioner shall be registered and accredited by the Executive Committee.

definitions.definition: the Appeals Committee appointed under section 15
the chairperson of the Executive Committee
a committee appointed by the Council under section 23
the Complaints Committee established under section 11
the Media Council established under section 3
the governing body of the Council elected under section 18(2)

a person engaged in the writing, editing or transmitting of news and information to the public, and includes a broadcaster under the Broadcasting Act (Cap. 72:04), a journalist, editor or publisher of a publication and the manager or proprietor of a publication or broadcasting station
a member of the Council but excludes an associate member
an instrument made by statutory instrument
all print, broadcast and electronic information which is published
issued for distribution, by sale or otherwise
a media institution or a person who is responsible for the production of a publication.
